{{Infobox technique
| name = Reaper’s Sword
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] unleashed the [[Reaper’s Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] performs a slash known as the [[Reaper’s Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Every [[Reaper’s Sword]] technique reduces the lifespan of the weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] took the stance for the [[Reaper’s Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
